name: Lumière
description: From defeating the Mime near the harbor.

name: Expedition 81
description: The first one you find, can't miss this one since it's part of a cutscene when you meet the friendly Jar Nevron (the one that wants you to "find light")

name: Expedition 68
description: Directly in the critical path to the end of the zone; can't miss it!

name: Nocturne pour un masque de tristesse
description: In the room with the dining table and the piano, there will be 4 interactable wall fixtures you can flip to reveal a hidden passage with this Record. You can get this any time you visit The Manor, no matter how you got there. Image below for additional visual assistance:

name: Expedition 63
description: Found just off the brick pathway that leads to the end of the area.

name: Expedition 52
description: Located past a small path just to the right of the Infirmary Doctor.

name: Expedition 66
description: After completing the area and Esquie knocks over the pillar, follow and explore that path.

name: Expedition 78
description: After the first Rest Point, hug the right wall until you reach a rope. It'll be just at the top.

name: Expedition 56
description: Once you reach the cliffs area, hug the left side and you'll see it near a statue.

name: Expedition 50
description: After the Paintress Shrine, hug the left side again and you'll see it near the cliffside.

name: Expedition 53
description: At the very end of the area.

name: Expedition 38
description: After the Harvester's Hollow Rest Point, on top of a large ramp next to the lake.

name: Expedition 44
description: After the Harvester's Hollow Rest Point, next to the giant lake, before the cave with the Mime.

name: Expedition 59
description: in a cave to the left of the Yellow Spire Wrecks Rest Point.

name: Expedition 62
description: Behind some blue rocks breakable by Esquie north of Gestral Village.

name: Goblu
description: Bought from the merchant just north of The Small Bourgeon.

name: Lights of the Past
description: Found in the Ancient Gestral City, east of Flying Waters on the World Map.

name: Un 33 Decembre a Lumière
description: Found in the Twilight Quarry, south of Esquie's Nest on the World Map.

name: Aline's Glasshouse
description: Found in the Lost Woods, just past the Yellow Harvest (a completely optional area/zone)

name: Gustave
description: Where you fought the Lampmaster. There's a rear entrance for quick access once you've started Act 2.

name: Expedition 41
description: Found directly to the right of the Battlefield Rest Point, in the trenches just before the Chromatic Luster Nevron. Hug the left wall to find it.

name: Expedition 57
description: Found shortly after the Battlefield Rest Point, on the way to the Ancient Bridge.

name: Expedition 65
description: At the end of the zone near the East Exit, past where you first met Monoco across a train track bridge.

name: Fracture Survivor
description: When the party is split up and you're in control of Maelle and Verso, you'll see a large pipe sticking out of the side of a cliff. Climb on, drop down inside, and use the Old Key from the beginning of the game to unlock the gate.

name: Expedition 58
description: Can't miss this one, it's the Journal that Lune finds in the cutscene at the end of their path.

name: Expedition 42
description: Facing towards the Manor at the end of the zone, head right before the hedges, then down a rope to find this Journal.

name: Renoir
description: On the left side of the Manor at the end of the zone, behind the hedges, there's another door to a room in the Manor that has this Record.

name: Renoir
description: Also in the same rooms where you found the Renoir Record.

name: Expedition 69
description: Found in the leftmost path (Joy) Continue hugging the left wall until you find it under a stone outcropping.

name: Expedition 39
description: Found in the middle path (Sadness) Hug the right wall and climb the cliff to find it at the top.

name: Unknown (1)
description: Found in the path just to the right of the middle path (Anger) Hug the right wall until you find a cave; a Manor door will be in there. Go inside to find the Journal.

name: Verso
description: In the same place in the Manor as the Unknown Journal.

name: Expedition 55
description: From the Dancing Classes Rest Point, head up the stairs and you should see it fairly easily on your right.

name: Expedition 67
description: Next to the Dancing Area Rest Point, near some boxes and corpses.

name: L'Amour d'une M'ère
description: Past the Tainted Battlefield Rest Point, you'll encounter a cave that leads to The Manor. It'll take you to a greenhouse with the Record.

name: Aline
description: Next to the L'amour D'une Mere Record in the same greenhouse.

name: Expedition 70
description: Past the Tainted Lumière Rest Point, you'll find an alleyway past a large circular set of stalls. Continue down that way, and the Journal will be there.

name: Expedition 54
description: Right next to the Chromatic Hexga. You can just grab it and try to fight it later, if you are so inclined.

name: Expedition 45
description: After the Giant Sapling boss, follow the critical path behind it and you'll find the Journal.

name: Expedition 36
description: Right in the middle, can't miss it.

name: Honeymoon in Lumière
description: Right in the middle, can't miss it.

name: Expedition 48
description: Right next to the friendly Nevron Troubadour that you teach how to play.

name: Our Painted Family
description: Right in the middle, can't miss it!

name: Révérence
description: Right in the middle, can't miss it!

name: Alicia's Birthday Party
description: Right in the middle, can't miss it!

name: Le Grand Cafe de Lumière
description: In the main carousel area after entering, there's a low key path to your left. The Record is at the end of that path.

name: Alicia
description: After the first Rest Point there's a couple ropes to go down. There's a Manor door down here, go in to find the Record behind it.

name: Expedition 35
description: Near the Manor door, there's a climbing spot which leads to this Journal.

name: Expedition 49
description: Behind the Young Boy, after doing what he asks.

name: Until Next Life
description: Given by the Young Boy, after defeating the boss.

name: Expedition 34
description: This Journal is one of the only things here, except for these ominous looking crows...

name: Expedition 51
description: Past the first Rest Point. Enter the area with all the broken trains (straight ahead after crossing the train track bridge), and you'll find the Journal next to a patrolling enemy.

name: Clea! Don't Pull Your Sister's Hair!
description: Past the cave with a rope. There'll be a grapple point at the end, which leads to a Manor door. Enter that door to get the Record.

name: Nocturne pour Lumière
description: When you first enter the area, you'll see a light above and what appears to be a merchant. Hug the right wall, until you reach a grapple point. Turn around after grappling, to grapple again across the chasm. Follow the path until you see the Merchant down below... but do NOT drop down. Instead, keep following the path until you find a tiny hole to drop through, and the Record will be there.

name: Lost Voice
description: A trader, Strabami, is selling it north of the exit when you finish the Forgotten Battlefield.

name: Expedition 64
description: East of Twilight Quarry, after landing on a small beach.

name: Expedition 47
description: Far west, as far as you can go on land, after exiting Monoco's Station from it's northwestern-most exit.

name: Expedition 43
description: Decently far east of the Coastal Cave.

name: Expedition 40
description: On an island very close to the Paintress' Monolith barrier, this is the island you'll be on once the barrier is broken.

name: Robe de Jour
description: On a small island south of the entrance to Sirène. You can buy it from the Merchant there.

name: Lettre à Maelle
description: Found after choosing to "Check up on the others." in Camp after defeating the 1st Axon. You'll get it after Verso and Maelle (and Esquie) enjoy some music.

name: Expedition 60
description: Just before the Opera House Rest Point, there's a small walkway leading to water to the east. There'll be an input to have Esquie fetch it for you!

name: Lumière (2nd Chance)
description: Inside the Opera House, in case you missed it during the Prologue.

name: Our Drafts Collide
description: Added automatically after beating the game.

name: Expedition 84
description: This Journal can be found just past the Noire named Blanche, another friendly Nevron.

name: Expedition 46
description: In order to unlock the door to Sirène's Dress, you must have Lune at relationship level 5, then she'll ask about her parent's Expedition. Defeat the Chromatic Glissando, and it'll be right behind it.

name: Unknown (2)
description: This starts in The Canvas, on the floating island west of The Monolith. You pick up the Dessendre Family Portrait from there, and you take it to any of the doors to The Manor. In the Main Foyer, there will be an empty portrait just up the stairs to the right. Place the Portrait you picked up, and the door far in the back will open, with this Journal in it.

name: Rêveries dans Paris
description: When you reach the main Casino building, loop around back to the right to find this Record.

name: Aline
description: Once you enter, you'll notice it's a very small area to navigate. You can easily find it at the very end.

name: Unknown (3)
description: From the "Ladder Area" Rest Point, move forward (southwest) from that flag, then drop down into the lowest level of that section. There will be another Manor Door will be right in the middle, next to stack of wood. Enter to find and unlock another Manor Room, as well as this Journal.

name: Expedition 61
description: Right on the critical path (can't miss it) after the "Foggy Area" Rest Point, just before another hot air balloon that takes you further up.

name: Clea
description: Automatically awarded upon completing the Endless Tower (all 33 fights)

name: Endless Light
description: When first entering Renoir's Drafts, keep progressing but hug the left wall as much as you can. You'll enter a path with a grappling point at the very end. Grapple onto the roof, and on the other end is the Record.

name: Simon
description: You must defeat Simon in The Abyss to get this Journal! There's no sneaking by this one...

name: Forlorn
description: There's another Manor Door in the southeastern side of the World Map. This is the same area where you chase the Chromatic Pétank. Inside you'll find another Manor Room with this Record in it.

name: Children of Lumière
description: Bought from a Gestral Merchant just outside of the entrance to the Sacred River.

name: Linen and Cotton
description: Bought from a Gestral Merchant just outside of the entrance to the Isle of the Eyes.

name: Expedition 37
description: In the northeastern side of the World Map, there's a Gestral Beach where you play the handhold mini-game (the one with the water bubbles). When you enter, on the right, the Journal will be there.

name: Julie Search and Rescue
description: Directly west of the northern exit from The Forgotten Battlefield, there's a small area that you can only reach with a flying Esquie. There's some dangerous enemies here, but you can just swoop in and grab the Journal without fighting them.

name: Verso
description: Same as above, but a little further in.

name: Sciel
description: Reach Relationship Level 6 with Sciel!

name: Lune
description: Reach Relationship Level 6 with Lune!

name: Monoco
description: Reach Relationship Level 6 with Monoco!
